Bash(python -c "
with open\('D:/Projects/Tools/StackGet/internal/detector/tools.go', 'rb'\) as f:
    content = f.read\(\)

replacements = [
    \(b'C:Program FilesMicrosoft Visual Studio\\xc2\\x822*Common7IDE',
     b'C:\\\\\\\\Program Files\\\\\\\\Microsoft Visual Studio\\\\\\\\2*\\\\\\\\Common7\\\\\\\\IDE'\),
    \(b'C:Program FilesMicrosoft Visual Studio\\xc2\\x819*Common7IDE',
     b'C:\\\\\\\\Program Files\\\\\\\\Microsoft Visual Studio\\\\\\\\9*\\\\\\\\Common7\\\\\\\\IDE'\),
    \(b'C:Program FilesNotepad++',
     b'C:\\\\\\\\Program Files\\\\\\\\Notepad++'\),
    \(b'C:Program Files \(x86\)Notepad++',
     b'C:\\\\\\\\Program Files \(x86\)\\\\\\\\Notepad++'\),
]

for old, new in replacements:
    content = content.replace\(old, new\)

with open\('D:/Projects/Tools/StackGet/internal/detector/tools.go', 'wb'\) as f:
    f.write\(content\)
print\('Done'\)
")
